name: evolve-lite
description: Recall and save Evolve entities in Codex without MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Recall and save reusable Evolve entities.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex plugin that helps you save reusable entities from successful sessions and recall them automatically on new prompts.
defaultPrompt: Recall Evolve entities for this task.
Save new Evolve learnings from this session.
Show me the entities stored for this repo.
